outcome_record.event_name: NRL State of Origin 2023 — Game 3 Decider, NSW Blues vs Queensland Maroons

prediction.pre_match_note: Series tied 1-1 decider. Form differential discounted 40% (rivalry compression). LOW confidence is CORRECT for Tier 1 rivalries. NSW home (Suncorp, Brisbane). Downstream signal: NRL congestion post-Origin more valuable than Origin pick itself.

calibration_flags.notes: LOW confidence (53.2) as correct output for State of Origin validated. Direction correct but LOW confidence is the right tier — 53% adjusted score correctly reflects derby unpredictability. Downstream NRL congestion signal (Penrith ×0.93, Parramatta ×1.04 for next round) was the higher-value signal. No active NRL token — prediction market only.
